entity.summary: Self-described global cryptocurrency exchange combining centralized trading with Web3 wallet access and broad international market coverage.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0277 and hei_unadded_0278 as one entity. Bitcointry's official site describes the platform as a global cryptocurrency exchange. HEI did not confirm a narrower legal domicile, so Global records the platform's supported operating scope rather than inventing a country assignment.

events.title: Bitcointry recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: Bitcointry is recorded as a self-described global cryptocurrency exchange, with CoinPaprika and CoinGecko candidate rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch, legal-provider, licensing, or headquarters event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: Bitcointry official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies Bitcointry identity and describes it as a global cryptocurrency exchange.
